title: Interpret Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscape
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Interpret Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural landscape demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Establish relationships with appropriate stakeholders

pcs.text: Acknowledge the determination of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples as the primary source of cultural knowledge information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Acknowledge the determination of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples as the primary source of cultural knowledge information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Acknowledge the determination of Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples as the primary source of cultural knowledge information.

pcs.text: Consult appropriate Cultural Authorities to gain approval to be on Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult appropriate Cultural Authorities to gain approval to be on Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult appropriate Cultural Authorities to gain approval to be on Country.

pcs.text: Investigate and record boundaries and extent of Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and record boundaries and extent of Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record boundaries and extent of Country.

pcs.text: Research the rights and Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) and copyright to cultural knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research the rights and Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) and copyright to cultural knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research the rights and Indigenous Cultural and Intellectual Property (ICIP) and copyright to cultural knowledge.

pcs.text: Investigate and record parameters for access and restrictions in transferring cultural knowledge and information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and record parameters for access and restrictions in transferring cultural knowledge and information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record parameters for access and restrictions in transferring cultural knowledge and information.

pcs.text: Work with Cultural Authorities to identify appropriate persons within local Communities who hold cultural knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work with Cultural Authorities to identify appropriate persons within local Communities who hold cultural knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work with Cultural Authorities to identify appropriate persons within local Communities who hold cultural knowledge.

pcs.text: Access cultural knowledge through the appropriate Knowledge Holders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access cultural knowledge through the appropriate Knowledge Holders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access cultural knowledge through the appropriate Knowledge Holders.

pcs.text: Determine and record key principles, values and practices of cultural knowledge with approval from appropriate Cultural Authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and record key principles, values and practices of cultural knowledge with approval from appropriate Cultural Authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and record key principles, values and practices of cultural knowledge with approval from appropriate Cultural Authorities.

pcs.text: Determine and record relationships between cultural knowledge and Country according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and record relationships between cultural knowledge and Country according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and record relationships between cultural knowledge and Country according to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Establish relationships with appropriate stakeholders

elements.title: Acquire information

pcs.text: Manage movement through area to minimise disturbance and degradation to the area and surrounding environments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Manage movement through area to minimise disturbance and degradation to the area and surrounding environments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage movement through area to minimise disturbance and degradation to the area and surrounding environments.

pcs.text: Identify landscape features and sites on Country in accordance with their place and role in local cultural practices and Ceremony through consultation with Community and local Knowledge Holders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify landscape features and sites on Country in accordance with their place and role in local cultural practices and Ceremony through consultation with Community and local Knowledge Holders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify landscape features and sites on Country in accordance with their place and role in local cultural practices and Ceremony through consultation with Community and local Knowledge Holders.

pcs.text: Identify landscape features and sites on Country in accordance with their place and role with the Dreaming, spirituality and local cultural practices and Ceremony through consultation with Community and local Knowledge Holders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify landscape features and sites on Country in accordance with their place and role with the Dreaming, spirituality and local cultural practices and Ceremony through consultation with Community and local Knowledge Holders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify landscape features and sites on Country in accordance with their place and role with the Dreaming, spirituality and local cultural practices and Ceremony through consultation with Community and local Knowledge Holders.

pcs.text: Make the association of connection to Country through language, stories, song, dance and art
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make the association of connection to Country through language, stories, song, dance and art?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make the association of connection to Country through language, stories, song, dance and art.

pcs.text: Use Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander names and common names, as appropriate, to identify fauna and flora used for food and medicine
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander names and common names, as appropriate, to identify fauna and flora used for food and medicine?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander names and common names, as appropriate, to identify fauna and flora used for food and medicine.

pcs.text: Investigate and record knowledge of relationships between plants and animals from Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander beliefs, land management and cultural perspectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate and record knowledge of relationships between plants and animals from Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander beliefs, land management and cultural perspectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate and record knowledge of relationships between plants and animals from Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander beliefs, land management and cultural perspectives.

pcs.text: Define simple bush tucker food chains relevant to Country and determine relationships to the cultural landscape
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define simple bush tucker food chains relevant to Country and determine relationships to the cultural landscape?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define simple bush tucker food chains relevant to Country and determine relationships to the cultural landscape.

pcs.text: Carry out investigations according to work health and safety and environmental sustainability policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out investigations according to work health and safety and environmental sustainability policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out investigations according to work health and safety and environmental sustainability policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Document investigations according to local Community protocols and permissions, to organisational standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document investigations according to local Community protocols and permissions, to organisational standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document investigations according to local Community protocols and permissions, to organisational standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Acquire information

elements.title: Relate information on cultural knowledge to authorised individuals or organisations

pcs.text: Seek permissions from Cultural Authorities, relevant individuals and organisations for access, use and documentation of cultural information and material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek permissions from Cultural Authorities, relevant individuals and organisations for access, use and documentation of cultural information and material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek permissions from Cultural Authorities, relevant individuals and organisations for access, use and documentation of cultural information and material.

pcs.text: Provide information on cultural knowledge to those who are authorised to possess that knowledge according to Community guidelines and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide information on cultural knowledge to those who are authorised to possess that knowledge according to Community guidelines and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide information on cultural knowledge to those who are authorised to possess that knowledge according to Community guidelines and Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander cultural protocols.

pcs.text: Relate information on cultural knowledge in an appropriate format and medium according to ICIP, Community guidelines and cultural protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Relate information on cultural knowledge in an appropriate format and medium according to ICIP, Community guidelines and cultural protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Relate information on cultural knowledge in an appropriate format and medium according to ICIP, Community guidelines and cultural protocols.

pcs.text: Refer requests for disclosure of information on cultural sites, landscapes and cultural material that infringes rights of a group or Community to appropriate Cultural Authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refer requests for disclosure of information on cultural sites, landscapes and cultural material that infringes rights of a group or Community to appropriate Cultural Authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refer requests for disclosure of information on cultural sites, landscapes and cultural material that infringes rights of a group or Community to appropriate Cultural Authorities.

pcs.text: Decline requests for disclosure of information on aspects of cultural knowledge by unauthorised individuals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Decline requests for disclosure of information on aspects of cultural knowledge by unauthorised individuals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Decline requests for disclosure of information on aspects of cultural knowledge by unauthorised individuals.
